versions.version_description: Fully scored play-along chord chart includes timed-out instrumental sections and slash chords as per the original recording.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Everybody Wants To Rule The World

content:
[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
In violent times, you shouldn't have to sell your soul[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
In black and white, they really really ought to know[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
Those one track minds that took you for a working boy[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch]
Kiss them goodbye, you shouldn't have to jump for joy[/tab]
[tab]                      ([ch]Gm[/ch])
You shouldn't have to shout for joy[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
They gave you life, and in return you gave them hell[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
As cold as ice, I hope we live to tell the tale[/tab]
[tab]                  ([ch]Gm[/ch])
I hope we live to tell the tale[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
     And when you've taken down your guard[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]                                            [ch]C[/ch]
If I could change your mind, I'd really love to break your heart[/tab]
[tab]                   ([ch]Gm[/ch])
I'd really love to break your heart[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, come on[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Shout, shout, let it all out, these are the things I can do without[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
Come on, I'm talking to you, so come on[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]   x2

[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
